title: Piper phyllostictum
taxonomy: Piper phyllostictum belongs to the family Piperaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pepper plants. This plant is part of the genus Piper, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The Piperaceae family is a monotypic family, meaning it consists of only one genus, Piper. The Piper genus is further divided into many species, each with unique characteristics and growth habits. Within the Piper genus, Piper phyllostictum is classified as a distinct species.
